last_fix.root_cause: OCR-collapsed two-year KSEK rows (e.g. "Operating profit 567 114 481 414") were interpreted as a single inflated EBIT token; year headers with single spaces were also under-detected.
last_fix.verification_method: Cached-text verification on cache/beijer_ref_ab_publ-unknown_year.txt plus wrapped TypeScript check.
last_fix.verification_output: Confirmed target row "Operating profit 567 114 481 414" and "Financial review 2015 2014" header shape; new year-token parsing captures [2015,2014], and new EBIT megascale guard converts 481414 -> 481 when revenue is 6595.
